post.description: Send a password reset code to the user's email. Uses the same code mechanism as account verification.
Validate email and password credentials. Returns access and refresh tokens plus user details if authentication succeeds.

200.description: Login successful, returns user info with tokens

post.description: Blacklists the provided refresh token and logs out the user from the current session.

get.description: Return the authenticated user's profile details.

post.description: Send a new verification code to the user's email via WhatsApp.
Validate reset code and set new password. Also marks account as verified.

put.description: Modify user profile fields such as name, phone, avatar, or email. Requires authentication.

patch.description: Require current password and new password. Validates old password before updating to new one.

401.description: Invalid old password or authentication required

post.description: Validate the verification code sent via WhatsApp and mark the account as verified.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of active admin users in your organization. You can filter by `query` (name/email/phone), and control pagination.

post.description: Create a new admin‐type user under your organization. If a `group` is provided, it must belong to the same organization or be a default group.

get.summary: Get details of a single admin user
get.description: Fetch all profile fields for an active admin user by their ID.

put.description: Partially or fully update attributes of an existing admin user. Only active users can be updated.

delete.description: Soft-delete an admin user by encrypting PII fields (`email`, `username`, `phone_number`). Default users cannot be deleted.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this user.

get.description: Return both default and organization-specific groups, ordered by rank then name.

200.description: A list of all active and default groups

post.description: Add a new group with rank, description, and permissions.

put.description: Modify name, rank, description or permissions of an active group.

delete.description: Soft-delete a group if it has no assigned users and is not default.

400.description: Cannot delete – either default or has users

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this Group.

get.description: Retrieve all application-specific permissions, excluding Django's built-in permissions.

post.description: Update existing settings or create new AppSetting for your organization. Supports partial updates.

get.description: Fetch the active AppSetting for your organization. If none exist, a default setting is created.

post.description: Initiate the forgot password process by sending a verification code to the user's registered phone number.

400.description: User not found or validation errors

post.description: Authenticate a mobile user using phone number and PIN. Returns user data with access and refresh tokens upon successful authentication.

401.description: Invalid credentials or user not authenticated

post.description: Logout the authenticated mobile user and invalidate their session.
Register a new mobile user by phone number. The phone number must be registered as a farmer first. A verification code will be sent to the phone number.

400.description: Validation errors or phone number not registered as farmer

post.description: Resend a new verification code to the user's phone number. Useful when the original code expires or is not received.

400.description: User not found or validation errors

post.description: Reset the user's password using the verification code sent to their phone number and set a new PIN. The user will be automatically verified after successful reset.

400.description: Invalid verification code or validation errors

post.description: Set a 4-digit PIN for a newly registered user or after password reset. Returns user data with tokens upon successful PIN setup.

400.description: Validation errors or user not found

put.description: Update the authenticated user's account information such as name, phone number, email, avatar, and gender. Partial updates are supported.

patch.description: Update the authenticated user's PIN by providing the old PIN and new PIN. User must be authenticated to perform this action.

401.description: Invalid old PIN or authentication required

post.description: Verify the phone number using the verification code sent during registration. After successful verification, user needs to setup their PIN.

400.description: Invalid verification code or validation errors

get.summary: Get active credit for the logged-in farmer
get.description: Fetch the active credit details for the current farmer.

get.summary: Get credit history for the logged-in farmer
get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of credits for the current farmer.

get.summary: Get payback history for the logged-in farmer
get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of paybacks for the current farmer.

Retrieve a paginated list of credits in your organization. Supports filtering by ID or farmer name (`query`), `payment_status`, `input_type`, issue date range, and initiating a CSV export (`export=true`).

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search by credit ID or farmer name

parameters.name: export
parameters.description: Set to 'true' to enqueue a CSV export task

200.description: Paginated list of credits (and optional export initiation message)

export_response.description: Background export initiation message, if requested

post.description: Register a new credit issuance for a farmer under the current organization. Validates that `due_date` is strictly after `issue_date`.

400.description: Validation error (e.g., missing or malformed fields, `due_date` must be after `issue_date`).

get.description: Fetch full details of an active credit you own, including approval status and outstanding amount.

put.description: Modify one or more attributes of an active credit in your organization. You may only update credits you own, and `due_date` must remain after `issue_date`.

400.description: Validation error (e.g., invalid date range or attempt to update a credit outside your organization).

delete.description: Soft-delete an inactive credit you own. Only credits with `approval_status='inactive'` and no active paybacks may be deleted.

400.description: Cannot delete: credit is still active or has outstanding paybacks.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this credit.

post.summary: Approve or deny a credit application
post.description: Perform an approval or denial on a pending credit. `action` must be 'approve' or 'deny'. If denying, `denial_notes` is required.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this credit.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of your organization's custom types merged with default types. Optional `query` parameter filters by category_name.

post.description: Create a custom type within your organization. Name must be unique among existing org and default types. Assigns creator and organization automatically.

put.description: Modify an active custom type in your organization. Default types cannot be updated and will return 403.

delete.description: Soft-delete a custom type, marking it inactive.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this Custom Type.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of customers in your organization. Supports filtering by name, phone number, email, or customer_id.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search by name, phone, email, or customer_id

post.description: Register a new customer under the current organization. Returns the complete customer record including generated `customer_id` and creator info.

put.description: Modify one or more attributes of a customer you own. Only active customers in your organization can be updated.

403.description: Attempt to update a customer outside your organization

delete.description: Soft-delete a customer by marking them inactive. Once deleted, the customer will no longer appear in listings.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this customer.

get.description:
Retrieves aggregated statistics about farmers including:
- Count of lead vs smallholder farmers
- Gender distribution
- Active warehouses count

Optional date filtering available.
Retrieve a paginated list of farms in your organization. Supports filtering by name/ID, type, size, crop type, or export initiation.

parameters.name: export
parameters.description: Set to 'true' to start export job

200.description: Paginated list of farms (and export job status if requested)

post.description: Register a new farm under the current organization. Returns the complete farm record including generated `farm_id` and associated products.

get.summary: Get details of a single farm
get.description: Fetch full details of an active farm by its ID, including products and creator info.

put.description: Modify one or more attributes of a farm you own. Only active farms in your organization can be updated.

403.description: Attempt to update a farm outside your organization

delete.description: Soft-delete a farm if no active farmers are assigned. Validates that all dependencies have been cleared first.

400.description: Cannot delete farm with active farmers

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this farm.

post.description: Deactivate specified products from the given farm in a single request.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this farm.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of farmers in your organization. Supports filtering by `query` (name, phone, email, farm name or ID), `farmer_type`, `ownership_type`, `country`, `lead` (lead farmer ID), and initiating an export job (`export=true`). To export you have to choose a `farmer type`.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search by name, phone, email, farm name or farmer_id

parameters.name: lead
parameters.description: Filter smallholders by lead farmer ID

parameters.name: export
parameters.description: Set to 'true' to start export background job

200.description: Paginated list of farmers and optional export status

post.description: Create a new farmer record under the current organization. Requires `name`, `type`, contact info, and optional `lead_farmer`. Assigns the farmer to the organization of the requesting user.

get.description: Fetch full details of an active farmer by ID, including linked farm and lead farmer.

put.description: Modify attributes of an active farmer in your organization. Only the fields provided will be updated.

delete.description: Soft-delete an active farmer. Marks the farmer record inactive and records the deleting user.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this farm.

get.summary: Get smallholders by lead farmer ID
get.description:
Retrieve paginated list of smallholder farmers under a specific lead farmer

Returns all active smallholder farmers (type='smallholder') that are associated with the specified lead farmer ID.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search term to filter smallholders (searches name, phone, email, farm name, farmer ID)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this farm.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of products in your organization. Supports filtering by name or type (`query`), `type`, `category`, `status`, `season_status`, creation date range, last-updated date range, and initiating an export job (`export=true`).

parameters.name: export
parameters.description: Set to 'true' to start export background job (requires `type`)

200.description: Paginated list of products and optional export job message

400.description: Missing required `type` when `export=true` or invalid filter values

post.description: Register a new product under the current organization. Validates that if `type` is `livestock`, a `breed` must be provided.

400.description: Validation error (e.g., missing breed for livestock or invalid fields)

get.description: Fetch full details of an active product you own, including metrics, category, and creator info.

put.description: Modify one or more attributes of an active product in your organization. You cannot update products belonging to other organizations. Season dates must satisfy `season_start <= season_end`.

400.description: Validation error (e.g., invalid date range or missing breed for livestock)

delete.description: Soft-delete an active product you own. Marks it inactive and records the deleting user.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this farm.

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of active inflow orders with optional filters: `status` (e.g., `order_approval`, `approved`), `destination_warehouse` (warehouse ID), `date_from` and `date_to` for `order_creation_date`, and text search on `order_id` or `comments`. Set `export=true` to initiate an export background task (pending implementation).

parameters.name: export
parameters.description: Set to 'true' to start export job

post.description: Create a new inflow order under the current organization. `products` must include at least one item with valid `product` and `farm` IDs, `quantity` > 0, and `unit_price` >= 0. Optional fields: `additional_costs` (boolean), `additional_cost_amount` (numeric), `comments` (string). Returns the full InflowOrder with generated `order_id`, `serial_number` for each product, and computed totals.

get.summary: Get details of a single inflow order
get.description: Fetch full details of an active inflow order by its ID, including products, media_files, and history.

put.description: Update an inflow order currently in `delivery_inspection` status only. Editable fields: `aggregator`, `procurement_officer`, `order_creation_date`, `expected_delivery_date`, `destination_warehouse`, `additional_costs`, `additional_cost_amount`, `comments`, and `products`. To modify existing products, include their `id`; to add new items, omit `id` with the same validation rules as creation.

403.description: Order cannot be updated in its current status

delete.description: Soft-delete an inflow order. Only orders in `delivery_inspection` status can be deleted. This sets `is_active` to False and records the deleting user via `soft_delete()`.

400.description: Cannot delete order in its current status

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this inflow order.

post.summary: Approve delivery inspection for an inflow order
post.description: Approve the `delivery_inspection` step for an inflow order. Provide `complaints` list with `order_product_id` (int), `problematic_quantity` (<= ordered), `reason` (str), optional `comment` (str), and `images` as base64 strings. Quantities exceeding the ordered amount will be rejected.

400.description: Validation error in complaints or images

404.description: Inflow order not found or not in delivery_inspection status

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this inflow order.

post.description: Finalize approval for an inflow order in `order_approval` status. Updates warehouse stock, sets `actual_delivery_date` to today, and logs history. No request body required.

404.description: Inflow order not found or not in order_approval status

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this inflow order.

get.summary: Retrieve a list of payback records
get.description:
Fetch a paginated list of paybacks for credits within the current organization. Supports filtering by:
- `credit`: ID of the credit record
- `method`: payment method (e.g., 'cash', 'transfer')
- `date_from` and `date_to`: date paid range (YYYY-MM-DD)
- `status`: payment status ('paid', 'partial')
If `date_from` is specified, `date_to` must also be provided. Results are ordered by `date_paid` descending.

parameters.name: date_from
parameters.description: Start date for date_paid filter (inclusive), format YYYY-MM-DD

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: End date for date_paid filter (inclusive), format YYYY-MM-DD

403.description: Forbidden: insufficient permissions to list paybacks

post.description: Record a payment against a credit. The payment amount must be a positive decimal not exceeding the current outstanding amount of the credit. If the payment fully covers the outstanding amount, the credit status is set to 'paid'; otherwise it remains 'partial'. Product and quantity_bags are optional and only required when tracking physical goods. Date_paid and status fields are read-only and will be auto-populated.

400.description: Validation error (e.g., amount exceeds outstanding, missing required fields)

403.description: Forbidden: insufficient permissions to create payback

put.description: Modify the payment amount or associated details of an existing payback. Adjusting the payment amount will recalculate the outstanding balance of the associated credit and update its payment status accordingly. Only amount, product, quantity_bags, and comments can be updated. The `date_paid` remains unchanged and `status` is recalculated based on the new outstanding amount.

403.description: Forbidden: insufficient permissions to update payback

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this credit payback.

get.description: Retrieve a list of all Ghana regions with their districts
Get detailed information about a specific region by its code

detail.example: Region with code 'XX' does not exist

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of warehouses in your organization. Supports filtering by name/ID, region, district, date ranges for creation or modification, and starting an export job.

parameters.name: export
parameters.description: Set to 'true' to start export job

200.description: Paginated list of warehouses (and export job status if requested)

post.description: Register a new warehouse under the current organization. Returns the complete warehouse record including generated `warehouse_id` and associated products.
Upload a CSV or Excel file to create multiple warehouses in one operation. You will be notified when processing completes.

get.summary: Get details of a single warehouse
get.description: Fetch full details of an active warehouse by its ID, including products and manager info.

put.description: Modify one or more attributes of a warehouse you own. Only active warehouses in your organization can be updated.

403.description: Attempt to update a warehouse outside your organization

delete.description: Soft-delete a warehouse if no active products are assigned. Validates that all dependencies have been cleared first.

400.description: Cannot delete warehouse with active products

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this farm.
